title: Brand Anthem Film
short_desc: Signature cinematic films that define your brand voice and vision.
long_desc:
Our Brand Anthem Film service creates a flagship story that captures who you are, what you stand for, and why audiences should care. These films are built for homepages, campaign launches, investor decks, and social rollouts where first impressions matter.

We lead the process end-to-end: brand discovery, creative development, scripting, production planning, filming, and cinematic post-production. The final result is a polished hero film plus platform-ready cutdowns so your message stays consistent across channels.

images.alt: Director framing a cinematic brand anthem scene
Production crew filming a founder-led brand story
Editor finishing a premium brand anthem film

tiers.name: Growth
tiers.desc: Two-day shoot with expanded storytelling and cutdowns

tiers.name: Flagship
tiers.desc: Multi-location production with full campaign asset set

title: Documentary Shorts
short_desc: Authentic short documentaries built around real people and real impact.
long_desc:
We produce Documentary Shorts that blend interview-led storytelling with cinematic b-roll to spotlight your mission, community, product journey, or social impact work. This format is ideal for nonprofits, founder stories, culture films, and customer narratives.

Our team handles research, interview prep, field production, and narrative editing so each film feels honest and emotionally grounded. Final deliveries include a polished short documentary and optional social excerpts to extend reach.

images.alt: Interview setup for a documentary short production
Field crew capturing documentary b-roll outdoors

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.desc: Multi-interview piece with expanded location coverage

tiers.name: Series
tiers.desc: Three-part documentary short series for campaigns

title: Commercial & Advertisement Videos
short_desc: High-impact spots that drive sales and brand recall.
long_desc:
We produce broadcast-ready commercial and advertisement videos tailored to your brand and campaign goals. From 15-second social spots to 60-second TV commercials, our team handles concept, scripting, filming, and post-production to deliver content that converts.

Deliverables include multiple cut lengths, platform-optimized versions, and optional subtitles. Typical turnaround is 2–4 weeks depending on scope.

title: Corporate Videos
short_desc: Authentic stories that build trust and culture.
long_desc:
Corporate videos that communicate your company's mission, values, and differentiators. We create everything from CEO messages and culture pieces to recruitment and investor reels. Our cinematic approach ensures your brand looks polished and professional.

We handle scripting, interviews, b-roll, and full post-production. Turnaround is typically 3–5 weeks for a standard corporate piece.

title: Product Marketing Videos
short_desc: Showcase your product in its best light.
long_desc:
Product marketing videos that highlight features, benefits, and use cases. Whether for e-commerce, trade shows, or social, we combine clean product cinematography with motion graphics and sound design to make your product stand out.

Deliverables include hero videos, unboxing-style content, and platform-specific cuts. Typical turnaround is 1–3 weeks.

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.desc: Full suite, motion graphics, multiple products

title: YouTube Video Production
short_desc: Full-service YouTube content that grows your channel.
long_desc:
End-to-end YouTube production: concept, scripting, filming, editing, thumbnails, and optimization. We create content that holds attention and aligns with platform best practices. Ideal for brands, creators, and educators looking to scale their channel professionally.

Deliverables include edited videos, custom thumbnails, and optional SEO copy. Turnaround varies by format (e.g., 1–2 weeks per standard upload).

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.desc: Full creative, multiple formats, priority turnaround

title: Full Post-Production / Video Editing
short_desc: Professional editing that shapes raw footage into stories.
long_desc:
We take your raw footage and deliver a polished final cut. Services include assembly edit, rough cut, fine cut, color grading, sound design, and mastering. Whether you've shot yourself or with another crew, our editors bring cinematic pacing and clarity to every frame.

Deliverables include project files (on request), multiple resolutions, and optional deliverables list. Turnaround is typically 1–2 weeks for a standard project.

title: Color Correction & Grading
short_desc: Cinematic look and consistent tone across your project.
long_desc:
Professional color correction and grading to give your footage a cohesive, cinematic look. We match shots, fix exposure and white balance, and apply creative LUTs or custom grades. Ideal for narrative, commercial, and documentary projects that need a polished finish.

Deliverables include graded masters and optional LUTs for your pipeline. Turnaround is typically 3–7 days depending on length.

title: Motion Graphics & Logo Animation
short_desc: Animated graphics and logos that capture attention.
long_desc:
Motion graphics and logo animations that elevate your brand. From stingers and lower thirds to full explainer segments, we create 2D and 3D motion that fits your visual identity. Logo animations are delivered in multiple formats for broadcast and web.

Deliverables include source files (on request), multiple resolutions, and alpha-channel versions. Typical turnaround is 1–2 weeks.

title: Explainer & Infographic Animations
short_desc: Clear, engaging animations that explain complex ideas.
long_desc:
Explainer and infographic animations that break down complex topics into clear, engaging visuals. We handle script, voiceover direction, storyboard, and animation to produce videos that educate and persuade. Ideal for SaaS, healthcare, finance, and education.

Deliverables include final video, optional multiple lengths, and subtitle files. Turnaround is typically 2–4 weeks.

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.desc: Long form, character animation, multiple cuts

title: Event Videography (weddings, conferences)
short_desc: Capture the moments that matter with cinematic coverage.
long_desc:
Full-service event videography for weddings, conferences, galas, and corporate events. We capture key moments, speeches, and atmosphere with a cinematic eye, then deliver a polished highlight film and optional full-length edit. Our approach is unobtrusive yet comprehensive.

Deliverables include highlight reel (3–10 min), full edit (optional), and raw footage (optional). Turnaround is typically 4–8 weeks for weddings, 2–4 weeks for corporate events.

title: Drone & Aerial Videography
short_desc: Stunning aerial perspectives for any project.
long_desc:
Licensed drone operations for real estate, commercials, events, and documentaries. We deliver smooth, cinematic aerial shots that add scale and drama to your project. All flights are conducted with proper permits and insurance.

Deliverables include graded aerial clips, multiple resolutions, and optional integration into a full edit. Turnaround is typically 1–2 weeks for footage delivery.
